steps.title: Name the repeated sequence
steps.content: The sentence describes each firefly species as having its own special series of repeated flashes and pauses. The blank needs a word for a recognizable repeated arrangement of signals.

steps.title: Exclude mismatched meanings
steps.content: A refers to amounts, not arrangements. B suggests ornament, not a communication sequence. D implies negotiated decisions, which does not fit biological signaling. The precise word is the one that names repeated arrangements. The answer is C.
